name: triserve
description: TriServe — Service Centre Management System + POS (Tristate Systems Ltd)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @triserve/api" "npm run dev -w @triserve/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @triserve/shared && npm run build -w @triserve/api && npm run build -w @triserve/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @triserve/shared && npm run build -w @triserve/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @triserve/api && npm run lint -w @triserve/web
